javascript:(function()%7Bvar%20c%3Ddocument%2Ca%3Dwindow%3Bfunction%20m()%7Btry%7Bvar%20e%3Da._spPageContextInfo%3Bif(e%26%26e.webServerRelativeUrl)return%20e.webServerRelativeUrl.replace(%2F%5C%2F%24%2F%2C%22%22)%2B%22%2FShared%2520Documents%2Fpermreg%22%7Dcatch(t)%7B%7Dvar%20r%3Dlocation.pathname.match(%2F%5E(%5C%2F(%3F%3Asites%7Cteams)%5C%2F%5B%5E%2F%5D%2B)%2F)%3Breturn(r%3Fr%5B1%5D%3A%22%22)%2B%22%2FShared%2520Documents%2Fpermreg%22%7Dvar%20s%3D%22%22%3Btry%7Ba.localStorage%26%26localStorage.getItem(%22permreg.dev.bundle-source%22)%3D%3D%3D%22local%22%26%26(s%3D(localStorage.getItem(%22permreg.dev.local-base%22)%7C%7C%22http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A18086%2Fpermreg%22).replace(%2F%5C%2F%2B%24%2F%2C%22%22))%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dvar%20l%3Dm()%2Cn%3Ds%7C%7Cl%2Ci%3D!!s%3Bfunction%20o(e)%7Bvar%20r%3D%22%5Bpermreg%5D%20%5Cu30D0%5Cu30F3%5Cu30C9%5Cu30EB%5Cu8AAD%5Cu8FBC%5Cu5931%5Cu6557%3A%20%22%2Bn%2B(e%3F%22%20(%22%2Be%2B%22)%22%3A%22%22)%2B%60%0A%60%2B(i%3F%22npm%20run%20dev%20%5Cu304C%5Cu8D77%5Cu52D5%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu3044%5Cu308B%5Cu304B%5Cu3001%5Cu8A2D%5Cu5B9A%5Cu306E%5Cu30ED%5Cu30FC%5Cu30AB%5Cu30EB%5Cu914D%5Cu4FE1URL%5Cu3092%5Cu78BA%5Cu8A8D%5Cu3057%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%5Cu3002%22%3A%22SP%20%5Cu306E%20%5Cu30C9%5Cu30AD%5Cu30E5%5Cu30E1%5Cu30F3%5Cu30C8%2Fpermreg%2F%20%5Cu306B%20dist%20%5Cu4E00%5Cu5F0F%5Cu3092%5Cu914D%5Cu7F6E%5Cu3059%5Cu308B%5Cu304B%5Cu3001%5Cu8A2D%5Cu5B9A%5Cu753B%5Cu9762%5Cu3067%5Cu958B%5Cu767A%5Cu8005%5Cu30E2%5Cu30FC%5Cu30C9%5Cu306B%5Cu5207%5Cu308A%5Cu66FF%5Cu3048%5Cu3066%5Cu304F%5Cu3060%5Cu3055%5Cu3044%5Cu3002%22)%3Balert(r)%2Cconsole.error(r)%7Dfunction%20p(e)%7Ba.__permregSource%3D%7Bbase%3An%2Cdev%3Ai%2Cver%3Ae%7D%2Cfetch(n%2B%22%2Fpermreg.bundle.js%3Fv%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(e)).then(function(r)%7Bif(!r.ok)throw%20new%20Error(%22HTTP%20%22%2Br.status)%3Breturn%20r.text()%7D).then(function(r)%7Btry%7B(0%2Ceval)(r)%7Dcatch(t)%7Bo(%22eval%3A%20%22%2B(t%26%26t.message%7C%7Ct))%7D%7D).catch(function(r)%7Bo(r%26%26r.message%7C%7C%22fetch%20error%22)%7D)%7Dfunction%20v(e)%7Bvar%20r%3Dc.getElementById(%22permreg-script%22)%3Br%26%26r.remove()%2Ca.__permregSource%3D%7Bbase%3An%2Cdev%3A!1%2Cver%3Ae%7D%3Bvar%20t%3Dc.createElement(%22script%22)%3Bt.id%3D%22permreg-script%22%2Ct.src%3Dn%2B%22%2Fpermreg.bundle.js%3Fv%3D%22%2BencodeURIComponent(e)%2Ct.onerror%3Dfunction()%7Bo(%22script%20load%20error%22)%7D%2Cc.body.appendChild(t)%7Dfetch(n%2B%22%2Fversion.txt%3Ft%3D%22%2BDate.now()%2C%7Bcredentials%3A%22same-origin%22%7D).then(function(e)%7Bif(!e.ok)throw%20new%20Error(%22HTTP%20%22%2Be.status)%3Breturn%20e.text()%7D).then(function(e)%7Bvar%20r%3D(e%7C%7C%22%22).trim()%7C%7CString(Date.now())%3Bi%3Fp(r)%3Av(r)%7D).catch(function(e)%7Bo(e%26%26e.message%7C%7C%22fetch%20error%22)%7D)%7D)()%3B%0A
